concerns.text: FR-004 mandates a standard OLS fit to quantify the temperature coefficient. Tasks T020 and T021 mandate pre-whitening (AR(1) residuals) and Newey-West SEs as the *primary* implementation. This silently changes the regression model from the spec's 'standard OLS' to a time-series corrected model without explicit spec authorization, violating the constraint that tasks must not relax or alter the FR's defined method.

SC-002 explicitly requires an ANOVA test to confirm no significant difference in slopes across sensitivity parameter sets. Phase 5 tasks (T026-T035) implement parameter sweeps and comparisons but contain no task to perform or report the ANOVA test. This drops a mandatory success criterion verification step.

FR-007 requires logging exclusion events with a 'count and date range'. Task T013 only specifies logging to a file without defining the log format to include these specific fields. This risks a deliverable that fails the FR's transparency requirement (semantic weakening of the logging constraint).

FR-001 requires downloading IceCube and ERA5 data. Task T006 creates a 'skeleton with placeholder download functions'. This is a retroactive narrowing (MVP/stub) of a mandatory FR without explicit spec staging, violating the constraint that tasks must not silently relax requirements.
